assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The response jumps directly into node pool upgrades without mentioning upgrading the GKE control plane first

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Clearly outlines coordinating→data→master upgrade order with rationale that coordinating nodes have lowest risk and masters are most critical

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: States 'The regional pd-ssd volumes will persist through the node replacements' addressing PV safety during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: No mention of Pod Disruption Budgets (PDB) or ensuring master quorum through PDB configuration

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Shows maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 only for coordinating nodes, but uses maxUnavailable=1 for data and master pools, not the conservative maxUnavailable=0

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes cluster health checks between upgrades and shows waiting for yellow/green status with curl commands to _cluster/health endpoint

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: No mention of checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain for data protection

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Includes kubectl wait and kubectl get pods commands to check StatefulSet and pod status during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: First step in preparation section shows creating snapshot repository and taking full cluster snapshot before upgrade
